span.p:
Flask App (Python 3.13)
- app.py entry point
- CORS enabled
- Port 5000

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MongoDB 8
- ECIRAS database
- Collections: users, messages,
referenced_articles
- Port 27017

span.p:
Ollama
- gemma3:1b model
- Port 11434
- REST API
